executives.name: Eric M. DeMarco
executives.background: Mr. DeMarco has served as our President and Chief Executive Officer since April 2004 and as a director since 2003. He previously served as President and COO of Titan Corporation.

executives.name: Deanna H. Lund
executives.background: Ms. Lund has served as our Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer since April 2004. She previously served as Vice President and Corporate Controller of Titan Corporation.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Jonah J. Adelman
executives.background: Mr. Adelman has served as President of our Microwave Electronics Division since our acquisition of General Microwave Corporation in 2008.

executives.name: Steven S. Fendley
executives.background: Mr. Fendley has served as President of our Unmanned Systems Division since 2017. He previously served as Senior Vice President of General Atomics Aeronautical Systems.

executives.name: Phillip D. Carrai
executives.background: Mr. Carrai has served as President of our Space, Training and Cybersecurity Division since 2009. He previously served as CEO of Ai-Metrix.

tenure_dates.title: President, Space, Training and Cybersecurity Division

executives.name: Marie Mendoza
executives.background: Ms. Mendoza has served as our Senior Vice President and General Counsel since 2015. She joined Kratos in 2011.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President and General Counsel

board_of_directors.name: William H. Hoglund
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Hoglund has served as a director since 2001 and as Chairman of the Board since 2023. He is a retired executive from General Motors.

board_of_directors.name: Eric M. DeMarco
board_of_directors.background: President and CEO of Kratos Defense & Security Solutions, Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Scott Anderson
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Anderson has served as a director since 2011. He is the President and CEO of Northeast Securities, Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Jane E. Judd
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Judd has served as a director since 2012. She is a retired partner from KPMG LLP.

board_of_directors.name: Amy J. Zegart
board_of_directors.background: Dr. Zegart has served as a director since 2014. She is a Senior Fellow at the Hoover Institution and a Professor of Political Science at Stanford University.

board_of_directors.name: Daniel M. Goure
board_of_directors.background: Dr. Goure has served as a director since 2015. He is a Vice President at the Lexington Institute.

board_of_directors.name: Samuel N. Grubbs
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Grubbs has served as a director since 2018. He is a retired executive from the defense industry.

sources.source_description: Annual Report on Form 10-K for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2023
